description: Build the Manager Dashboard with all tabs: Overview (stats + charts), Product Management with AI-powered product upload (Claude Vision + Unsplash), Inventory (ABC analysis), Orders/Refunds, Reports (with AI summary), and Settings.
steps: Create src/renderer/pages/ManagerDashboard.tsx - PIN-protected access (4-digit), sidebar navigation with icons + labels for all tabs
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/PinLock.tsx - 4-digit PIN entry modal with bcrypt verification via IPC
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/Sidebar.tsx - vertical sidebar with tab icons and labels, active state highlight
--- TAB A: OVERVIEW ---

Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/overview/StatCards.tsx - animated countUp stat cards: Today Revenue (vs yesterday %), Orders Count, Avg Order Value, Gross Profit, Net Profit, Profit Margin % (colored green/amber/red by threshold)
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/overview/RevenueChart.tsx - 7-day line chart using Recharts with APEX DARK styling
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/overview/TopProducts.tsx - horizontal bar chart of top 5 products
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/overview/HourlyHeatmap.tsx - 24 colored cells (blue=low, amber=peak)
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/overview/RecentTransactions.tsx - last 10 transactions table with status badges
--- TAB B: PRODUCT MANAGEMENT ---

Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/products/ProductTable.tsx - searchable table with columns: image, name, category, cost, price, margin%, stock, status. Inline edit for price/cost/stock. Status toggle Active/Inactive. Bulk select + bulk actions (delete, change category)
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/products/AddProductWizard.tsx - multi-step wizard component orchestrating the AI flow

Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/products/DropZone.tsx - large centered drop zone using react-dropzone, dashed border with blue glow, rotating dashed ring animation (CSS orbit), accepts JPG/PNG/WEBP, shows image preview after drop

Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/products/AIProcessing.tsx - animated loading state with blue orbit ring + 'AI is analyzing...' text, calls Claude API via backend, parses structured JSON response, auto-fills form
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/products/UnsplashGallery.tsx - after AI extracts name, fetches 4 images from Unsplash API, shows grid, click to select, original upload as option 1

Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/products/ProductForm.tsx - all fields pre-filled by AI (with 'AI suggested' badge), fully editable: Name, Description, Category dropdown, Cost Price, Selling Price, Profit Margin % (auto-calc, colored green >40%, amber 20-40%, red <20%), Tax Rate, Stock, Low Stock Threshold, Unit, Barcode/SKU, Tags, Status toggle. Real-time validation (price > cost, required fields)

Create src/main/routes/ai.ts - POST /api/ai/analyze-image (sends image to Claude vision API with the specified system prompt, returns structured JSON), POST /api/ai/summary (sends 30-day data to Claude for report summary)
Create src/main/routes/unsplash.ts - GET /api/unsplash/search?query=... (proxies to Unsplash API with access key from settings)
--- TAB C: INVENTORY ---

Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/inventory/ABCAnalysis.tsx - ABC classification view (A: top 80% revenue green, B: 80-95% amber, C: 95-100% gray) using the ABC analysis algorithm from utils/algorithms.ts
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/inventory/StockLevels.tsx - stock level table with visual progress bars
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/inventory/LowStockAlerts.tsx - list of products below threshold
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/inventory/RestockSuggestions.tsx - suggestions based on sales velocity x lead time with EMA trend badges (trending up/down)
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/inventory/ExportButton.tsx - export to CSV functionality
--- TAB D: ORDERS & REFUNDS ---
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/orders/OrderHistory.tsx - full order list with filters (date, payment method, cashier, amount range)
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/orders/OrderDetailModal.tsx - line items, discounts, tax breakdown, customer info
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/orders/RefundButton.tsx - partial/full refund, restores stock, writes refund record
Create src/main/routes/refunds.ts - POST /api/refunds (process refund, restore stock, create refund record)
--- TAB E: REPORTS ---
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/reports/DateRangePicker.tsx - date range selector
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/reports/SalesReport.tsx - revenue by day/week/month chart
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/reports/ProfitReport.tsx - gross/net profit, margin trends
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/reports/ProductPerformance.tsx - units sold, revenue, profit per product table
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/reports/PaymentBreakdown.tsx - cash vs card vs wallet pie/bar chart
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/reports/AISummaryCard.tsx - button sends 30 days of data to Claude, displays plain-English summary in styled card
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/reports/ExportReport.tsx - export to PDF (via pdfkit endpoint) or CSV
Create src/main/routes/reports.ts - GET /api/reports/sales, /api/reports/profit, /api/reports/products, /api/reports/payments with date range params. POST /api/reports/pdf to generate PDF
--- TAB F: SETTINGS ---
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/settings/BusinessInfo.tsx - name, address, logo upload, currency selector
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/settings/TaxSettings.tsx - global tax rate + per-category overrides
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/settings/PinManagement.tsx - change manager PIN (bcrypt hashed)
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/settings/ReceiptCustomization.tsx - header, footer message, show/hide fields
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/settings/UserManagement.tsx - cashier accounts (name + PIN, role: cashier/manager)
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/settings/APIKeys.tsx - Claude API key, Unsplash API key, Stripe API key inputs (stored encrypted via electron-store)
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/settings/ThemeToggle.tsx - Dark/Light toggle
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/settings/SoundSettings.tsx - toggle register sounds
Create src/renderer/components/dashboard/settings/BackupSettings.tsx - auto-backup toggle + backup folder path
Create src/main/routes/settings.ts - GET/PUT /api/settings (key-value store CRUD)
acceptance_criteria: Manager Dashboard is accessible only after correct PIN entry
Overview tab shows all 6 stat cards with animated countUp and Recharts charts
Product Management table supports inline editing and bulk actions
AI product upload flow: drop image -> Claude vision analysis -> auto-fill form -> Unsplash image suggestions
Inventory tab shows ABC analysis with correct color coding and EMA trend badges
Orders tab lists all orders with filters and supports partial/full refunds that restore stock
Reports tab generates charts for all report types and AI summary calls Claude API
Settings tab saves all configuration to SQLite via the settings key-value table
All Express API routes are created and handle errors gracefully
npx tsc --noEmit passes for all new files
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/POS-AI && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -20
